notes: Immortal 1.44: Turn any phone into a remote for your Portal. Open a web page on the same Wi-Fi — scan the QR from the new remote button on the home screen — for navigation, a touchpad, keyboard input, an app launcher, and one-tap presets, with nothing to install and support for several Portals at once. Also: the photo frame is never blank again, thanks to a keyless fallback chain that ends with photos bundled in the app (so it works even with no network), and web-page screensavers no longer swallow taps.
